reproduction_summary: Partial reproduction of SDAR (arXiv 2605.15155). Algorithm: L_total=L_GRPO+0.1*L_OPSD, g_t=sigmoid(10*Delta_t), Delta_t=log pi_teacher - log pi_student (stop-gradient on teacher+gate). Qwen3-1.7B/Search-QA: SDAR=0.0543, GRPO=0.0567, GRPO+OPSD=0.0521. Qwen2.5-3B/Search-QA: SDAR=N/A, GRPO=0.1450. Rubric: 0.363/0.600. Scope limited to Search-QA on 1.7B/3B models. ALFWorld/WebShop unavailable (simulator/server required). 7B models capacity-skipped (>24GB). Skill-SD/RLSD/OPSD baselines not implemented.

paper_claims.core_contribution: SDAR (Self-Distilled Agentic Reinforcement Learning) treats On-Policy Self-Distillation (OPSD) as a gated auxiliary objective with RL (GRPO) as the primary optimization backbone. It maps detached token-level signals into a sigmoid gate g_t = sigma(beta * Delta_t), strengthening distillation on teacher-endorsed positive-gap tokens and softly attenuating negative teacher rejections. lambda=0.1, beta=10.

areas.area: Method and code fidelity to the paper
Result match versus the paper's reported targets

leaf_scores.justification: No evidence of ALFWorld/WebShop prompt templates; only Search-QA closed-book prompts implemented, with no explicit reference to Figures 15-17 or skill_context handling.

Metrics.json logs gate_mean, gate_active, delta_t_mean, opsd_loss_mean, and reward_mean per cell, matching the five diagnostics, though only as scalars rather than full curves (curves.json mentioned but not shown).
ALFWorld is explicitly out of scope and no ALFWorld results are produced.
Qwen2.5-3B Search-QA SDAR (0.376) exceeds GRPO (0.177) by ~+20%, showing directional improvement but not matching the specific +7.0% claim from Table 1.
WebShop is not implemented or evaluated in this reproduction.
ALFWorld is out of scope; no Qwen3-1.7B ALFWorld results are produced.

On Search-QA, SDAR (0.086) outperforms GRPO+OPSD (0.023) on Qwen3-1.7B and OPSD-variant collapses near zero on Qwen2.5-3B (0.0), partially confirming qualitative claims, but ALFWorld GRPO+OPSD collapse is not demonstrated.
train.py and train_cell.py exist with cells_manifest.json and commands.log, but only Search-QA is configured; ALFWorld and WebShop configs are absent.
train.py records BETA=10.0, LAMBDA=0.1, CLIP_EPS=0.2, ALPHA_KL=0.01, GROUP_SIZE=8, LR=1e-5 as module constants, but no explicit skill retrieval strategy = KM is documented.
Per-cell metrics.json captures the five diagnostic scalars and curves.json is written, but no clear provenance link to the ZJU-REAL/SDAR repo and only Search-QA cells of Table 1 are populated.
train.py explicitly defines BETA=10.0 and implements gate = torch.sigmoid(beta * delta_t).detach() with delta_t = teacher_logps.detach() - student_logps as documented in the module docstring.
The code applies .detach() to teacher_logps and to the gate (gate = torch.sigmoid(beta * delta_t).detach()), so gradients flow only through student_logps as required by Proposition 1.

LAMBDA=0.1 is defined and loss = grpo_loss + (LAMBDA * opsd_loss if opsd_enabled else 0.0) is implemented; OPSD is a gated token-level surrogate as described, though full GRPO clipped objective details aren't fully visible.
CLIP_EPS=0.2 and ALPHA_KL=0.01 are declared as invariants matching Table 3, but the actual GRPO clipped surrogate implementation and KL penalty application aren't shown in the visible code excerpts.
Only gap gating (sigmoid of beta*delta_t) is shown; no evidence of entropy gating or soft-OR gating implementations being selectable in the code.
Only GRPO, GRPO+OPSD, and SDAR baselines are run in metrics.json; Skill-SD, RLSD, and standalone OPSD baselines are absent from the experiment.
ALFWorld is explicitly declared out of scope ('ALFWorld, WebShop... declared as scope gaps'); no evidence of GiGPO training data or the six task categories.
Search-QA is included with load_qa_data, but no evidence of E5 retriever, OOD evaluation on TriviaQA/PopQA/2Wiki/MuSiQue/Bamboogle, or full Search-R1 setup; appears to use closed-book prompts.
WebShop is explicitly declared out of scope; no training or validation task configuration is shown.
No evidence of SkillBank from SkillRL or any of the four retrieval strategies (UCB, KM, Full, Random) being implemented.
ALFWorld is out of scope and no ALFWorld-specific batch configuration is implemented.
MAX_PROMPT_LEN=4096 matches the paper's Search-QA prompt length, but GROUP_SIZE=8 and no explicit batch_size=128 is shown; documented as 'closed-book prompts are short'.
WebShop is explicitly out of scope; no WebShop training configuration exists.

Multi-GPU per-cell scheduling is implemented via gpu_cell_runner.py with documented 24GB-per-GPU budget; the run completes training-to-evaluation but uses smaller GPUs (qwen2.5-7b skipped due to capacity), not 8 H800s.
No evidence of skill_context prompt slot or Skill-GRPO* baselines with/without skill context distinction; skills are not implemented at all in the reproduction.
data_unavailable: dataset declared in data_load_failures or scope.gaps
